creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
You will need to recompile xchat with debug (WITH_DEBUG=3Dyes) to get go=
od  =

backtraces. You don't have any problem with 2.8.4_3 until you upgraded i=
t  =

to 2.8.4_4? The difference in between of 2.8.4_3 and 2.8.4_4, the  =

xchat/files/patch-xc284-fix-scrollbfdleak was added in 2.8.4_4.

Cheers,
Mezz
